heading: Acquisition of lands by Governor of the Territory of Hawaii
label: 397c Acquisition of lands by Governor of the Territory of Hawaii
text: In order to cooperate with the Secretary of the Interior in consolidating in Federal ownership lands within the area described in , and to facilitate acquisition of the lands needed for the national historical park, the Governor of the Territory of Hawaii is also authorized to acquire lands for said park, at the expense of the Territory of Hawaii by exchange or otherwise, in accordance with procedure prescribed by .section 397 of this titlesection 392 of this title
notes: Admission of Hawaii as StateAdmission of Hawaii into the Union was accomplished , on issuance of Proc.
